subject: staging: rtl8192u: null check the kzalloc

features.post_operation: NULL check on returned pointer (and error-path propagation)
features.path_conditions: After kzalloc returns, before any use/dereference, the returned pointer must be checked for NULL; on NULL, the caller must propagate -ENOMEM.
features.fit_test_reasoning: kzalloc acquires a heap resource that may fail (return NULL). The required post-operation is a NULL check, which is a control-flow validation rather than a release/free, but it still maps to the lifecycle pattern of 'acquire -> validate before use'. The fix adds the missing post-operation (null check + error propagation). This is the canonical missing-check after allocator pattern.
